display.purpose: Page titles and hero sections only. Plus Jakarta Sans at 700 weight.

headline.purpose: Section headings, card titles. Satoshi at 600 weight.

title.purpose: Panel headings, dialog titles, sidebar sections. Satoshi at 600 weight, 18px fixed.

body.purpose: All body copy. Satoshi at 400 weight, 15px. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Captions, metadata, timestamps. Satoshi at 500 weight, 13px.

mono.purpose: Metrics, codes, table data. JetBrains Mono at 500 weight, 14px.

shadows.name: ambient-xs
shadows.purpose: Subtle ambient hint on inputs (shadcn shadow-xs). Not structural.

shadows.name: ambient-sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle ambient hint on cards (shadcn shadow-sm). Not structural.

motion.name: ease-micro
motion.purpose: Default for hover, focus, toggle state changes.

motion.name: ease-layout
motion.purpose: For expand, collapse, and layout transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Spectral Violet fill, used for primary actions on every screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--primary, #9660D8); color: var(--primary-foreground, #E8E8F0); padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-hover, #AB72E8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, #9660D8) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Subtle secondary action. Transparent background, only reveals on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground, #A6A6B4); padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--surface, #24242F); color: var(--foreground, #E8E8F0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, #9660D8) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-ghost svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: For delete, remove, and irreversible actions. Signal Red fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: var(--destructive, #D45346); color: white; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--destructive, #D45346) 90%, black); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--destructive, #D45346) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-destructive svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for grouped content. Surface tone with subtle border, no shadow.
components.html:
Card Title

Supporting description text.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--card, #24242F); border: 1px solid var(--border, #3A3A4A); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { background: var(--surface-elevated, #2D2D3A); border-color: var(--border-strong, #515166); } .ds-card-header { display: grid; grid-template-rows: auto auto; align-items: start; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; color: var(--foreground, #E8E8F0); margin: 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--muted-foreground, #A6A6B4); margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with transparent background, subtle border, and Spectral Violet focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, #E8E8F0); border: 1px solid var(--border, #3A3A4A); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; height: 36px; width: 100%; min-width: 0; font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; outline: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, #737385); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--ring, #9660D8); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #9660D8) 50%, transparent); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: var(--destructive, #D45346); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--destructive, #D45346) 20%, transparent); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact label for categories, statuses, and metadata. Full-pill shape.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap; transition: color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-badge svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-badge-default { background: var(--accent-muted, #272040); color: var(--foreground, #E8E8F0); } .ds-badge-secondary { background: var(--secondary, #24242F); color: var(--secondary-foreground, #E8E8F0); } .ds-badge-destructive { background: var(--destructive-muted, #351A18); color: white; } .ds-badge-outline { background: transparent; border-color: var(--border, #3A3A4A); color: var(--foreground, #E8E8F0); } .ds-badge:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #9660D8) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Left navigation rail. Same background as page, purple active state with indent signal.
components.html: MAINDashboardInbox
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: var(--background, #1A1A24); width: 256px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 8px; } .ds-sidebar-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-sidebar-label { font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted-foreground, #A6A6B4); padding: 8px 12px 4px; } .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--sidebar-foreground, #A6A6B4); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-sidebar-item svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(--accent, #9660D8); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: var(--surface, #24242F); color: var(--foreground, #E8E8F0); } .ds-sidebar-item-active { background: var(--accent-muted, #272040); color: var(--accent, #9660D8); font-weight: 600; } .ds-sidebar-item-active:hover { background: var(--accent-muted, #272040); color: var(--accent, #9660D8); }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Centered placeholder for screens with no content yet. One action, no apology.
components.html: No properties yet
components.css: .ds-empty-state { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; padding: 64px 24px; } .ds-empty-state svg { color: var(--muted-foreground, #A6A6B4); } .ds-empty-state-text { font-family: 'Satoshi', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--muted-foreground, #A6A6B4); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Reputation Key's interface is built like a well-made tool — every element earns its place, every surface is purposeful. The dark-first palette uses tinted violet-graphite neutrals with a single Spectral Violet accent, eliminating visual noise so users focus on the task. No glass, no gradients, no decorative textures. Hierarchy is communicated through type scale, weight contrast, and spacing rhythm alone.

The system is designed for three distinct contexts: property managers working in focused evening sessions on desktop, staff checking progress on mobile between tasks, and clients leaving reviews in brief mobile visits. Each context gets the same level of craft — responsive is not a fallback, it's the design.

This system explicitly rejects: SaaS dashboard clichés (hero metric cards, gradient accents, glassmorphism), Linear's specific cool-black-and-blue identity, over-designed admin tools with decorative motion, and the warm-cream AI default. What remains is a tool that disappears into the task.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first with clean light mode inversion
Single Spectral Violet accent used at ≤10% of surface area
Tonal elevation through background lightness steps, not shadows
Fixed rem type scale for product UI consistency
shadcn/ui component vocabulary with purposeful customization
No decorative animation — motion conveys state, not spectacle

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Spectral Violet is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what gives it power. If a screen feels drab, the answer is better typography and spacing, not more accent.

rules.name: The Tonal Stack Rule
rules.body: Depth is communicated through lightness steps (Obsidian → Surface → Elevated), never through drop shadows. A surface that needs shadow to read as elevated is a surface that needs a lighter tone.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem sizes, not fluid clamps. Headings that shrink in sidebars or data panels look broken, not responsive.

rules.name: The Three-Family Cap
rules.body: Satoshi, Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono. No fourth font. One well-tuned sans with weight contrast carries more authority than three competing faces.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows, when they appear at all, are ambient hints (≤8px blur) applied to inputs and focus rings, not structural elements.

rules.name: The Ghost Border Fallback
rules.body: When two flat surfaces of the same tone need separation, a 1px border at --border provides the division. The border disappears when the surfaces differ in tone.

dos: Do use Spectral Violet for primary actions, active states, and focus indicators only. Its power comes from scarcity.
Do communicate depth through tonal layering (Obsidian → Surface → Elevated). A lighter surface reads as elevation.
Do use the 6px radius for buttons and inputs, 12px for cards. Consistency in shape vocabulary builds trust.
Do keep body text at 15px with 1.55 line-height. The slight increase over 14px matters for readability in data-dense screens.
Do use Satoshi at 500-600 weight for labels and headings. The medium weights carry enough presence without bold's aggression.
Do respect the three-font cap: Satoshi, Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono. No fourth family.
Do keep animations to 150ms ease-out for micro-interactions, 200ms for layout transitions. Motion is state feedback, not decoration.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — all transitions become instant.
donts: Don't use drop shadows for elevation. Tonal layering is the system.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-filter blur for decorative surfaces.
Don't ship hero-metric cards (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Don't use identical card grids of icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use display fonts in UI labels, buttons, or data.
Don't imitate Linear's exact color palette.
Don't use warm cream/sand/beige backgrounds in light mode.
Don't over-round elements. Cards top out at 12px.
